## mngr ovh list

**Usage:**

```text
mngr ovh list [OPTIONS]
```

## Other Options

| Name | Type | Description | Default |
| ---- | ---- | ----------- | ------- |
| `--all` | boolean | List every VPS the account owns, not just those tagged for mngr. By default, only VPSes tagged with `mngr-provider` are shown. | `False` |
